recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.85 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 88% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 2 packages gaining traction
recommendations.detail: @mcptoolshop/xrpl-lab, @mcptoolshop/sovereignty show organic growth with download spikes. Capitalize with blog posts, social media, or conference talks.

recommendations.title: 3 packages predicted to grow
recommendations.detail: Statistical models predict >20% growth in the next 7 days for @mcptoolshop/xrpl-lab, @mcptoolshop/sovereignty, @mcptoolshop/npm-launcher.

recommendations.title: 5 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @mcptoolshop/polyglot-mcp, @mcptoolshop/websketch-ir, @mcptoolshop/claude-sfx. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 78 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: sovereignty-game, mcpt, tool-compass, file-compass, comfy-headless scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: 2 packages surging
actionableAdvice.action: Capitalize now: write a blog post, tweet, or submit to newsletters. Post a "Thank you" issue or discussion.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.85 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 88% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.
